content.problemStatement: Given two distinct words startWord and targetWord, and a list denoting wordList of unique words of equal lengths. Find all shortest transformation sequence(s) from startWord to targetWord. You can return them in any order possible.
constraints: startWord, targetWord, and all words in wordList consist of lowercase English letters.
No two words in wordList are the same.
startWord is not equal to targetWord.
content.inputFormat: The input will contain three parameters: startWord (string), targetWord (string), and wordList (array of strings).
content.outputFormat: The output will be an array of arrays, where each inner array represents a transformation sequence from startWord to targetWord.

solution.approach: Use a breadth-first search (BFS) algorithm to explore all possible transformation sequences from startWord to targetWord.
